name: 12_Spam_Detection_SVM_Enron_ML
query: Habari. Nahitaji ujenge mradi wa kugundua barua pepe za spam kwa kutumia kielekezi cha Support Vector Machine (SVM) kwenye seti ya data ya Enron-Spam. Mradi unapaswa kusindika maandishi kwa kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji, kutumia vipengele vya TF-IDF, kufanya tuning ya hyperparameter kwa kutumia GridSearchCV, na kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kwenye `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Pia nahitaji kuandika na kuhifadhi ripoti ya kina, ikijumuisha usahihi, kumbukumbu, alama ya F1, na matriki ya mkanganyiko (itakayotengenezwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`), chini ya `results/classification_report.pdf`. Seti ya data ya Enron-Spam inapaswa kupakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Usindikaji wa maandishi, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji, na kuhesabu vipengele vya TF-IDF unapaswa kufanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kielekezi cha SVM kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Tuning ya hyperparameter inapaswa kufanywa kwa kutumia GridSearchCV katika `src/train.py`. Itakuwa muhimu ikiwa hatua ya usindikaji wa maandishi itaboreshwa kushughulikia idadi kubwa ya barua pepe kwa ufanisi.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Enron-Spam" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa maandishi unafanywa, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Tuning ya hyperparameter inafanywa kwa kutumia "GridSearchCV" katika `src/train.py`.
Ripoti ya uainishaji, ikijumuisha "usahihi," "kumbukumbu," "alama ya F1," na picha `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`, inahifadhiwa kama `results/classification_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Hatua ya usindikaji wa maandishi inapaswa kuboreshwa kushughulikia idadi kubwa ya barua pepe kwa ufanisi.
Ripoti ya uainishaji inapaswa kuwa ya kina.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Enron-Spam" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "Enron-Spam" dataset. Instead, it contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` — no actual dataset loading logic, no file paths to Enron-Spam data, no CSV/email parsing, and no real data pipeline. The word "Enron-Spam" appears only as a string in the `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list and `KEYWORDS` list, not as part of any functional code that loads the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa maandishi unafanywa, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a string `"loaded"` and some notes — there is no actual text preprocessing logic implemented. Specifically, there is no code for removing stop words or punctuation. The file only lists these requirements as strings in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` but does not implement them functionally.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement TF-IDF features. It only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a dictionary with a string `"loaded"` and some notes, and a `build_transforms()` function returning a list of strings. There is no actual TF-IDF implementation (e.g., no `TfidfVectorizer` from scikit-learn or any equivalent). The word "TF-IDF" appears only in the `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list and `KEYWORDS` list as metadata strings, not as functional code.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual SVM classifier implementation. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder with keyword lists and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no import of `sklearn.svm.SVC` or any other SVM library, no model training logic, no fitting or prediction methods — just metadata strings referencing "SVM classifier" as keywords. This is not a functional SVM implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Tuning ya hyperparameter inafanywa kwa kutumia "GridSearchCV" katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file does not implement `GridSearchCV` for hyperparameter tuning. Instead, it contains only a minimal/stub implementation with a simple loop (`train()` function) and artifact creation (`save_expected_artifacts()`). Although `GridSearchCV` is listed in the `KEYWORDS` array, it is never actually imported or used in any functional code. There is no SVM model training, no dataset loading, and no actual hyperparameter tuning performed anywhere in the file.

<SATISFIED>

Faili `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi kama inavyoonekana kwenye Project Tree. Ingawa picha haikuweza kusomwa vizuri kutokana na hitilafu ya API (tatizo la aina ya media ya picha), uwepo wa faili hii katika saraka sahihi `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` unathibitisha kwamba hitaji la kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko katika eneo lililotajwa limetimizwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya uainishaji, ikijumuisha "usahihi," "kumbukumbu," "alama ya F1," na picha `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`, inahifadhiwa kama `results/classification_report.pdf`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The classification report PDF file (`results/classification_report.pdf`) cannot be read because it is empty ("Cannot read an empty file"). Additionally, the confusion matrix image (`results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`) exists but could not be verified due to an image format error. Since the PDF file is empty, it cannot contain the required classification metrics ("usahihi/precision," "kumbukumbu/recall," "alama ya F1/F1-score") nor the confusion matrix image. The requirement is therefore not satisfied.
